name: Dovre Group Plc
summary: Dovre Group Plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides project management services worldwide. It operates in two segments, Project Personnel and Consulting. The Project Personnel segment provides project personnel services for various investment projects. The Consulting segment offers management and project management consulting and software for enterprise level management in Nordic countries. This segment also offers project advisory services. Dovre Group Plc serves private companies and public organizations in energy, mining, building infrastructure, and pulp and paper industries. The company was formerly known as Proha Plc and changed its name to Dovre Group Plc in March 2011. Dovre Group Plc was founded in 1983 and is in Espoo, Finland.
